note: Before/after pairs. Real photos: pre-restoration prints (the green project car) paired with the finished-car shoot. before and after paths are relative to the site base. system and docs are optional.

pairs.caption: As acquired: an oxidized green coupe with rust blistering along the rockers, on steel wheels. Finished: silver-blue metallic on Fuchs-style alloys.
Bodywork: the shell stripped to primer with a bondo-worked nose on the trailer, then color-sanded silver-blue.
Wheels: original steel discs with hubcaps, then 911 / Fuchs-style alloys.
